subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who is named Ahmad, who hath triumphed through Our days, soared in Our atmosphere, and spoken Our beauteous praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن سمی باحمد الذی فاز بایامی و طار فی هوائی و نطق بثنائی الجمیل
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution
